content:
i do 95% of what you ask of me. I need you to make quality time for me to make me feel like what i do for you is worth it.

whether it’s intentional or not, you keep hurting me. i buy you lunch and you talk about how your gonna go fuck other people. whether it’s a joke or not, its fucked up. and seems designed specifically to attack me.
arent i the person you should be sweet to?

so idk, you wont say nice things, you wont be affectionate with me, you’re not giving me anything to work with. i’m not sure if this is meaningful to you or if this going anywhere, the ambiguity is killing me.

i remember the only compliment you’ve given me since i’ve known you. the first day we met, you said, ‘you have nice eyes.’

i need to feel valued and i need to feel respected and I need quality time to validate my efforts. if you can’t do that for me, then we can’t talk anymore.

i dont want to stop talking because despite that stuff, there’s something about you that i dont want to lose.

you have work, school, family stuff, and you’re moving at some point. i’m getting increasingly more emotionally invested in something that isnt going anywhere or at least doesnt seem to be. and where it is currently is not fulfilling my needs.
context: From document: i do 95% of what you ask of me. I need you to make quality time for… — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
